items.title: 二阶线性微分方程与Laplace变换
items.content_html:
二阶常系数齐次线性微分方程的解结构

对于微分方程

y′′+py′+qy=0y'' + py' + qy = 0 y′′+py′+qy=0

朴素换元法

令u=y′−myu = y' - myu=y′−my，代入原方程待定系数：

u′−nu=(y′−my)′−n(y′−my)=y′′−(m+n)y′+mny=0u' - nu = (y'-my)' - n(y'-my) = y'' - (m+n)y' + mny = 0 u′−nu=(y′−my)′−n(y′−my)=y′′−(m+n)y′+mny=0

对比 y′′+py′+qy=0y'' + py' + qy = 0y′′+py′+qy=0，只需

m+n=−p,mn=qm+n = -p,\quad mn = q m+n=−p,mn=q

即 m,nm,nm,n 是特征方程 r2+pr+q=0r^2+pr+q=0r2+pr+q=0 的两个根。此时原方程化为：

{y′=my+uu′=nu\begin{cases} y' = my + u \\ u' = nu \end{cases} {y′=my+uu′=nu​

dudt=nu⟹ln⁡u=nt+C⟹u=C1ent\frac{\mathrm{d}u}{\mathrm{d}t} = nu\Longrightarrow \ln u = nt+ C\Longrightarrow u = C_1e^{nt} dtdu​=nu⟹lnu=nt+C⟹u=C1​ent

dydt−my=C1ent⟺ dy−mydt=C1entdt⟺ d(yemt)=C1e(n−m)tdt⟺ y=C1ent+C2emt\begin{aligned} &\frac{\mathrm{d}y}{\mathrm{d}t}-my = C_1 e^{nt}\\ \Longleftrightarrow\,& \mathrm{d}y -my \mathrm{d}t = C_1 e^{nt}\mathrm{d}t\\ \Longleftrightarrow\,& \mathrm{d}\left(\frac{y}{e^{mt}}\right) = C_1 e^{(n-m)t}\mathrm{d}t\\ \Longleftrightarrow\,& y = C_1 e^{nt}+ C_2 e^{mt} \end{aligned} ⟺⟺⟺​dtdy​−my=C1​entdy−mydt=C1​entdtd(emty​)=C1​e(n−m)tdty=C1​ent+C2​emt​

其中方程

λ2+pλ+q=0\lambda^2 +p\lambda + q = 0 λ2+pλ+q=0

为常微分方程的特征方程，根据韦达定理，两个根m,nm,nm,n 为特征根，作为通解的指数基的幂次。

线性代数视角：令 X=(yy′)X=\begin{pmatrix} y \\ y' \end{pmatrix}X=(yy′​)，则 X′=(01−q−p)XX' = \begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1 \\ -q & -p \end{pmatrix} XX′=(0−q​1−p​)X。换元 u=y′−myu=y'-myu=y′−my 即坐标变换 Z=(yu)=(10−m1)XZ=\begin{pmatrix} y \\ u \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 0 \\ -m & 1 \end{pmatrix}XZ=(yu​)=(1−m​01​)X，将系统矩阵上三角化为 (m10n)\begin{pmatrix} m & 1 \\ 0 & n \end{pmatrix}(m0​1n​)，实现逐步解耦：u′=nu  →  y′=my+uu'=nu \;\to\; y'=my+uu′=nu→y′=my+u。本质上就是算子因式分解 (D−n)(D−m)y=0(D-n)(D-m)y=0(D−n)(D−m)y=0。

考虑初值

{y(0)=y0y′(0)=y˙0\begin{dcases} y(0) = y_0\\ y'(0) = \dot{y}_0 \end{dcases} {y(0)=y0​y′(0)=y˙​0​​

带入通解满足

{C1+C2=y0mC1+nC2=y˙0\begin{dcases} C_1+C_2 = y_0\\ mC_1 +n C_2 = \dot{y}_0 \end{dcases} {C1​+C2​=y0​mC1​+nC2​=y˙​0​​

得

{C1=ny0−y˙0n−mC2=my0−y˙0m−n\begin{dcases} C_1 = \frac{ny_0 - \dot{y}_0}{n-m}\\ C_2 = \frac{my_0 - \dot{y}_0}{m-n} \end{dcases} ⎩⎨⎧​C1​=n−mny0​−y˙​0​​C2​=m−nmy0​−y˙​0​​​

Laplace Transform

进行Laplace 变换可得:

−y˙0+sL(y′)+p[−y0+sY(s)]+qY(s)=0⟺ −y˙0+s(−y0+sY(s))−py0+psY(s)+qY(s)=0⟺ Y(s)(s2+ps+q)=y0s+py0+y˙0\begin{aligned} &-\dot{y}_0+s\mathcal{L}(y') + p\left[-y_0 +sY(s)\right] + qY(s) = 0\\ \Longleftrightarrow \,& -\dot{y}_0 + s(-y_0 + sY(s)) -py_0 +psY(s) +qY(s) = 0\\ \Longleftrightarrow \,& Y(s)(s^2+ps+q) = y_0s+py_0+\dot{y}_0 \end{aligned} ⟺⟺​−y˙​0​+sL(y′)+p[−y0​+sY(s)]+qY(s)=0−y˙​0​+s(−y0​+sY(s))−py0​+psY(s)+qY(s)=0Y(s)(s2+ps+q)=y0​s+py0​+y˙​0​​

Y(s)=y0s+py0+y˙0s2+ps+q=y0s+py0+y˙0m−n[1s−m−1s−n]=1m−ny0(s−m)+py0+y˙0+my0s−m−1m−ny0(s−n)+py0+y˙0+ny0s−n=1m−npy0+y˙0+my0s−m−1m−npy0+y˙0+ny0s−n\begin{aligned} Y(s) &= \frac{y_0s +py_0+ \dot{y}_0}{s^2+ps+q} \\ &= \frac{y_0s +py_0+ \dot{y}_0}{m-n} \left[ \frac{1}{s-m}- \frac{1}{s-n}\right]\\ & = \frac{1}{m-n} \frac{y_0(s-m)+py_0+\dot{y}_0+ my_0}{s-m} - \frac{1}{m-n} \frac{y_0(s-n)+py_0+\dot{y}_0+ ny_0}{s-n}\\ & = \frac{1}{m-n}\frac{py_0+\dot{y}_0+ my_0}{s-m} - \frac{1}{m-n} \frac{py_0+\dot{y}_0+ ny_0}{s-n}\\ \end{aligned} Y(s)​=s2+ps+qy0​s+py0​+y˙​0​​=m−ny0​s+py0​+y˙​0​​[s−m1​−s−n1​]=m−n1​s−my0​(s−m)+py0​+y˙​0​+my0​​−m−n1​s−ny0​(s−n)+py0​+y˙​0​+ny0​​=m−n1​s−mpy0​+y˙​0​+my0​​−m−n1​s−npy0​+y˙​0​+ny0​​​

Laplace 逆变换得

y(t)=py0+y˙0+my0m−nemt+py0+y˙0+ny0n−ment=−ny0+y˙0m−nemt+−my0+y˙0n−ment\begin{aligned} y(t) &= \frac{py_0+\dot{y}_0+ my_0}{m-n} e^{mt} + \frac{py_0+\dot{y}_0+ ny_0}{n-m} e^{nt}\\ & = \frac{-n y_0 + \dot{y}_0}{m-n}e^{mt} + \frac{-my_0+\dot{y}_0}{n-m} e^{nt} \end{aligned} y(t)​=m−npy0​+y˙​0​+my0​​emt+n−mpy0​+y˙​0​+ny0​​ent=m−n−ny0​+y˙​0​​emt+n−m−my0​+y˙​0​​ent​

这个结论和前文的直接换元的方法的结果是一致的

简谐振动

不含一阶项的二阶系统称为简谐系统

mx¨+kx=0m\ddot{x} + k x = 0 mx¨+kx=0

特征根为两个共轭虚根

λ1,2=±kmi\lambda_{1,2} = \pm\sqrt{\frac{k}{m}} i λ1,2​=±mk​​i

因此通解结构为

x=C1ekmit+C2e−kmit=(C1+C2)cos⁡(kmt)−i(C1−C2)sin⁡(kmt)=A1cos⁡λt+A2sin⁡λt\begin{aligned} x &= C_1e^{\sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}it} + C_2 e^{-\sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}it}\\ & = (C_1+C_2) \cos\left( \sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}t\right) - i(C_1-C_2) \sin \left(\sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}t\right)\\ & = A_1 \cos \lambda t + A_2 \sin \lambda t \end{aligned} x​=C1​emk​​it+C2​e−mk​​it=(C1​+C2​)cos(mk​​t)−i(C1​−C2​)sin(mk​​t)=A1​cosλt+A2​sinλt​

ωn:=λ=km\omega_n: = \lambda = \sqrt{\frac{k}{m}}ωn​:=λ=mk​​ 称为固有圆频率

A1=x0A2=x0′λA_1 = x_0\quad A_2 = \frac{x'_0}{\lambda} A1​=x0​A2​=λx0′​​

因此

∥x∥=∥A1cos⁡λt+A2sin⁡λt∥=A12+A22=x02+x0′2λ2=x02+x0′2ωn2\|x\| = \|A_1\cos\lambda t+ A_2\sin \lambda t\| = \sqrt{A_1^2+A_2^2} = \sqrt{x_0^2+\frac{x_0'^2}{\lambda^2}} = \sqrt{x_0^2+\frac{x_0'^2}{\omega_n^2}} ∥x∥=∥A1​cosλt+A2​sinλt∥=A12​+A22​​=x02​+λ2x0′2​​​=x02​+ωn2​x0′2​​​

arg⁡x=arctan⁡A1A2=arctan⁡λx0x0′=arctan⁡ωnx0x0′\arg x = \arctan \frac{A_1}{A_2} = \arctan \frac{\lambda x_0}{x_0'} = \arctan \frac{\omega_nx_0}{x_0'} argx=arctanA2​A1​​=arctanx0′​λx0​​=arctanx0′​ωn​x0​​

线性阻尼系统

考虑线性阻尼f=−cv=−cx˙f = -cv = -c\dot{x}f=−cv=−cx˙, 牛顿第二定律改写为

mx¨+cx˙+kx=0⟺x¨+cmx˙+kmx=0m\ddot{x} + c\dot{x} + kx = 0 \Longleftrightarrow \ddot{x}+\frac{c}{m}\dot x + \frac{k}{m}x = 0 mx¨+cx˙+kx=0⟺x¨+mc​x˙+mk​x=0

令 ωn=km\omega_n = \sqrt\frac{k}{m}ωn​=mk​​, ζ=c2mωn=c2mk\zeta = \frac{c}{2m\omega_n} = \frac{c}{2\sqrt{mk}}ζ=2mωn​c​=2mk​c​, 则有

x¨+2ζωnx˙+ωn2x=0\ddot{x} + 2\zeta \omega_n \dot x + \omega_n^2 x = 0 x¨+2ζωn​x˙+ωn2​x=0

s1,2=−ζωn±ζ2−1ωns_{1,2} = -\zeta\omega_n\pm \sqrt{\zeta^2-1} \omega_n s1,2​=−ζωn​±ζ2−1​ωn​

根据ζ\zetaζ 和0，1 的相对关系，可以将二阶系统分为过阻尼/欠阻尼/负阻尼/临界阻尼等状态

Laplace 变换得

X(s)(s2+2ζωns+ωn2)=0X(s)(s^2+2\zeta\omega_n s+\omega_n^2)=0 X(s)(s2+2ζωn​s+ωn2​)=0

s2+2ζωns+ωn2=(s+ζωn)2+ωn2(1−ζ2)s^2+2\zeta\omega_n s+\omega_n^2 = (s+\zeta\omega_n)^2+\omega_n^2(1-\zeta^2) s2+2ζωn​s+ωn2​=(s+ζωn​)2+ωn2​(1−ζ2)

欠阻尼情况下(0<ζ<10<\zeta <10<ζ<1), 有

s1,2=−ζωn±ωn1−ζ2is_{1,2} = -\zeta\omega_n \pm \omega_n \sqrt{1-\zeta^2}i s1,2​=−ζωn​±ωn​1−ζ2​i

因此对应的通解结构为

x=Ae−ζωnsin⁡(ωn1−ζ2t+φ)x = Ae^{-\zeta\omega_n} \sin(\omega_n \sqrt{1-\zeta^2}t+\varphi) x=Ae−ζωn​sin(ωn​1−ζ2​t+φ)

得到含线性阻尼的等效圆频率

ωd=ωn1−ζ2\omega_d = \omega_n \sqrt{1-\zeta^2} ωd​=ωn​1−ζ2​

阻尼导致的系统稳定性由特征根的复平面分布相关

  • ∣ζ∣<1|\zeta|<1∣ζ∣<1, 特征根为复根， 此时系统为正弦震荡发散(不稳定)/正弦震荡收敛(稳定)曲线，根据指数项正负确定

  • ∣ζ∣>1|\zeta|>1∣ζ∣>1， 特征根为实根， 此时系统为指数发散或者指数收敛。ζ>1\zeta >1ζ>1时过阻尼单调衰减， ζ<−1\zeta < -1ζ<−1时，负阻尼单调发散

  • ζ=0\zeta = 0ζ=0 零阻尼系统，系统为标准正弦震荡

  • ζ=1\zeta = 1ζ=1 临界阻尼系统， 系统为指数单调衰减

简谐激励的二阶系统响应

对于

mx¨+cx˙+kx=F0sin⁡ωtm\ddot{x} + c\dot{x} + kx = F_0 \sin \omega t mx¨+cx˙+kx=F0​sinωt

特解总是 sin⁡ωt\sin \omega tsinωt 和 cos⁡ωt\cos \omega tcosωt 的线性组合， 可以假设特解为 x~=Xsin⁡(ωt−φ)\tilde{x} = X\sin (\omega t-\varphi)x~=Xsin(ωt−φ), 代入得

X(k−mω2)sin⁡(ωt−φ)+cωXcos⁡(ωt−φ)=F0sin⁡ωt=F0cos⁡φsin⁡(ωt−φ)+F0cos⁡φsin⁡(ωt−φ)X(k-m\omega^2)\sin (\omega t-\varphi) + c\omega X\cos (\omega t-\varphi) = F_0\sin \omega t = F_0 \cos \varphi \sin(\omega t - \varphi) + F_0 \cos \varphi \sin(\omega t -\varphi) X(k−mω2)sin(ωt−φ)+cωXcos(ωt−φ)=F0​sinωt=F0​cosφsin(ωt−φ)+F0​cosφsin(ωt−φ)

[X(k−mω2)−F0cos⁡φ]sin⁡(ωt−φ)+[cωX−F0sin⁡φ]cos⁡(ωt−φ)=0\left[X(k-m\omega^2)-F_0\cos\varphi\right]\sin(\omega t-\varphi) + \left[ c\omega X-F_0\sin\varphi\right] \cos(\omega t -\varphi) = 0 [X(k−mω2)−F0​cosφ]sin(ωt−φ)+[cωX−F0​sinφ]cos(ωt−φ)=0

{F0cos⁡φ=X(k−mω2)F0sin⁡φ=cωX⟺F02=X2(k−mω2)2+(cω)2X2\begin{dcases} F_0\cos\varphi = X(k-m\omega^2)\\ F_0\sin \varphi = c\omega X \end{dcases} \Longleftrightarrow F_0^2 = X^2\left(k-m\omega^2\right)^2+(c\omega)^2X^2 {F0​cosφ=X(k−mω2)F0​sinφ=cωX​⟺F02​=X2(k−mω2)2+(cω)2X2

特解的幅值

X=F0(k−mω2)2+(cω)2X = \frac{F_0}{\sqrt{(k-m\omega^2)^2+(c\omega)^2}} X=(k−mω2)2+(cω)2​F0​​

相位滞后

φ=arctan⁡cωk−mω2\varphi = \arctan \frac{c\omega}{k-m\omega^2} φ=arctank−mω2cω​

由于 ωn2=km\omega_n^2 = \frac{k}{m}ωn2​=mk​, 2ζωn=cm2\zeta\omega_n = \frac{c}{m}2ζωn​=mc​ 换元得

{X=F0k(1−(ωωn)2)2+(2ζωωn)2φ=arctan⁡2ζωωn1−ω2ωn2\begin{dcases} X = \frac{F_0}{k\sqrt{(1-(\frac{\omega}{\omega_n})^2)^2+ (2\zeta\frac{\omega}{\omega_n})^2}}\\ \varphi = \arctan \frac{2\zeta \frac{\omega}{\omega_n}}{1-\frac{\omega^2}{\omega_n^2}} \end{dcases} ⎩⎨⎧​X=k(1−(ωn​ω​)2)2+(2ζωn​ω​)2​F0​​φ=arctan1−ωn2​ω2​2ζωn​ω​​​

特解为

x~(t)=F0k(1−(ωωn)2)2+(2ζωωn)2sin⁡(ωt−arctan⁡2ζωωn1−ω2ωn2)\tilde{x}(t) = \frac{\frac{F_0}{k}}{\sqrt{(1-(\frac{\omega}{\omega_n})^2)^2+ (2\zeta\frac{\omega}{\omega_n})^2}}\sin \left(\omega t- \arctan \frac{2\zeta \frac{\omega}{\omega_n}}{1-\frac{\omega^2}{\omega_n^2}}\right) x~(t)=(1−(ωn​ω​)2)2+(2ζωn​ω​)2​kF0​​​sin(ωt−arctan1−ωn2​ω2​2ζωn​ω​​)

记 λ=ωωn\lambda = \frac{\omega}{\omega_n}λ=ωn​ω​ 为频率比

当系统为静力激励时

mx¨+cx˙+kx=F0m\ddot x + c\dot x + kx = F_0 mx¨+cx˙+kx=F0​

特解

X0=F0kX_0 = \frac{F_0}{k} X0​=kF0​​

其中 F0k\frac{F_0}{k}kF0​​ 称为零频率挠度， λ=ωωn\lambda = \frac{\omega}{\omega_n}λ=ωn​ω​ 称为频率比

因此视相对静力激励的幅值放大称为幅值放大因子 β=XX0=1(1−λ2)2+(2ζλ)2\beta = \frac{X}{X_0} = \dfrac{1}{\sqrt{(1-\lambda^2)^2+ (2\zeta\lambda)^2}}β=X0​X​=(1−λ2)2+(2ζλ)2​1​ , 有

对于周期为 TTT 的激励 F(t)F(t)F(t), 满足

an=1T∫−T2T2F(t)sin⁡ωntdtbn=1T∫−T2T2F(t)cos⁡ωntdta_n =\frac{1}{T}\int_{-\frac{T}{2}}^{\frac{T}{2}} F(t)\sin \omega_n t \mathrm{d}t\quad b_n = \frac{1}{T}\int_{-\frac{T}{2}}^{\frac{T}{2}} F(t)\cos \omega_n t \mathrm{d}t an​=T1​∫−2T​2T​​F(t)sinωn​tdtbn​=T1​∫−2T​2T​​F(t)cosωn​tdt

且

{mx¨0+cx˙0+kx0=a0mx¨s,n+cx˙s,n+kxs,n=bnsin⁡ωntmx¨c,n+cx˙c,n+kxc,n=bncos⁡ωnt\begin{dcases} m\ddot x_0 + c\dot x_0 + kx_0 = a_0\\ m\ddot x_{s,n} + c\dot x_{s,n} + kx_{s,n} = b_n\sin \omega_n t\\ m\ddot x_{c,n} + c\dot x_{c,n} + kx_{c,n} = b_n\cos \omega_n t \end{dcases} ⎩⎨⎧​mx¨0​+cx˙0​+kx0​=a0​mx¨s,n​+cx˙s,n​+kxs,n​=bn​sinωn​tmx¨c,n​+cx˙c,n​+kxc,n​=bn​cosωn​t​

阶跃激励下的二阶系统响应

考虑

mx¨+cx˙+kx=F^δ(t)m\ddot {x} + c\dot x+ kx = \hat{F}\delta(t) mx¨+cx˙+kx=F^δ(t)

Laplace 变换得

(ms2+cs+k)X(s)=F^(ms^2+cs+k)X(s) = \hat{F} (ms2+cs+k)X(s)=F^

X(s)=F^ms2+cs+k=F^m1s2+2ζωns+ωn2=F^m1(s+ζωn)2+ωn2(1−ζ2)=F^m(s1−s2)[1s−s1−1s−s2]x(t)=F^2mωn1−ζ2i(es1t−es2t)=F^mωn1−ζ2e−ζωntsin⁡ωn1−ζ2t=F^mωde−ζωntsin⁡ωdt\begin{aligned} X(s) &= \frac{\hat{F}}{ms^2+cs+k} \\ & = \frac{\hat{F}}{m} \frac{1}{s^2+2\zeta \omega_n s+\omega_n^2}\\ & = \frac{\hat{F}}{m} \frac{1}{(s+\zeta\omega_n)^2+\omega_n^2(1-\zeta^2)}\\ & = \frac{\hat{F}}{m(s_1-s_2)}\left[\frac{1}{s-s_1}-\frac{1}{s-s_2}\right]\\ x(t)& = \frac{\hat{F}}{2m\omega_n \sqrt{1-\zeta^2}i}( e^{s_1 t}- e^{s_2t})\\ & = \frac{\hat{F}}{m\omega_n \sqrt{1-\zeta^2}} e^{-\zeta\omega_nt} \sin \omega_n\sqrt{1-\zeta^2}t \\ & = \frac{\hat{F}}{m\omega_d} e^{-\zeta \omega_n t }\sin \omega_ d t \end{aligned} X(s)x(t)​=ms2+cs+kF^​=mF^​s2+2ζωn​s+ωn2​1​=mF^​(s+ζωn​)2+ωn2​(1−ζ2)1​=m(s1​−s2​)F^​[s−s1​1​−s−s2​1​]=2mωn​1−ζ2​iF^​(es1​t−es2​t)=mωn​1−ζ2​F^​e−ζωn​tsinωn​1−ζ2​t=mωd​F^​e−ζωn​tsinωd​t​

记单位阶跃响应函数为

考虑阶跃点的平移

items.title: 随机高斯向量的单位模引理与正交性定理
items.content_html:
\newcommand{\bbR}{\mathbb{R}} \newcommand{\calG}{\mathcal{G}}

\newcommand{\rmd}{\,\mathrm{d}}

随机高斯向量的单位模引理与正交性定理

预备定理

Markov 不等式

XXX为非负随机变量, ε>0\varepsilon>0ε>0，μ=E(X),σ2=V(X)\mu = E(X), \sigma^2 = V(X)μ=E(X),σ2=V(X), 则

P(∣X−μ∣≥ε)≤σ2ε2P(|X-\mu|\geq \varepsilon)\leq \frac{\sigma^2}{\varepsilon^2} P(∣X−μ∣≥ε)≤ε2σ2​

Proof:\mathbf{Proof}:Proof:

\begin{aligned} \sigma^2 &= \int_{-\infty}^{\infty}(x-\mu)^2p(x)\rmd x\\ &\geq \int_{|x-\mu|\geq \varepsilon}(x-\mu)^2p(x)\rmd x\\ &\geq \varepsilon^2 \int_{|x-\mu|\geq \varepsilon}p(x)\rmd x\\ &=\varepsilon^2 P(|x-\mu|\geq\varepsilon) \end{aligned}

即

P(∣x−μ∣≥ε)≤σ2ε2P(|x-\mu|\geq \varepsilon)\leq \frac{\sigma^2}{\varepsilon^2} P(∣x−μ∣≥ε)≤ε2σ2​

Cramér-Chernoff方法

∀λ>0\forall \lambda > 0∀λ>0, 有

∣x−μ∣≥ε⟺eλ∣x−μ∣≥eλε|x-\mu|\geq \varepsilon\Longleftrightarrow e^{\lambda |x-\mu|}\geq e^{\lambda \varepsilon} ∣x−μ∣≥ε⟺eλ∣x−μ∣≥eλε

因此有

P(∣x−μ∣≥ε)=P(eλ∣x−μ∣≥eλε)≤e−λaE(eλ∣x−μ∣)⟺P(∣x−μ∣≥ε)≤min⁡λ>0e−λaE(eλ∣x−μ∣)P(|x-\mu|\geq \varepsilon)=P(e^{\lambda |x-\mu|}\geq e^{\lambda \varepsilon})\leq e^{-\lambda a}\mathbb{E}(e^{\lambda |x-\mu|})\Longleftrightarrow P(|x-\mu|\geq \varepsilon)\leq \min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda a}\mathbb{E}(e^{\lambda |x-\mu|}) P(∣x−μ∣≥ε)=P(eλ∣x−μ∣≥eλε)≤e−λaE(eλ∣x−μ∣)⟺P(∣x−μ∣≥ε)≤λ>0min​e−λaE(eλ∣x−μ∣)

从而可以求解最优的概率PmaxP_{max}Pmax​以及对应的λ0\lambda_0λ0​, 这个上界称为Chernoff Bound

Key Concept

随机高斯向量定义为

\calG=\left\{u\in \bbR^n\Big | u\sim \mathcal{N}(0,\frac{1}{n}I_n)\right\}

单位模引理

\forall u\in \calG,\forall \varepsilon \in (0,1), P(|\|u\|^2-1|\geq \varepsilon)\leq 2\exp(-\frac{\varepsilon^2 n}{8})

Proof:\mathbf{Proof}:Proof:
由Cramér-Chernoff方法

P(∣∥u∥2−1∣≥ε)≤min⁡λ>0e−λεE(eλ∣∥u∥2−1∣)P(|\|u\|^2-1|\geq \varepsilon )\leq \min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda\varepsilon}E(e^{\lambda|\|u\|^2-1|}) P(∣∥u∥2−1∣≥ε)≤λ>0min​e−λεE(eλ∣∥u∥2−1∣)

当∥u∥2≥1\|u\|^2\geq 1∥u∥2≥1时：

P(∥u∥2−1≥ε)=P(∥u∥2≥1+ε)≤min⁡λ>0e−λ(ε+1)E(eλ∥u∥2)P(\|u\|^2-1\geq \varepsilon )=P(\|u\|^2\geq 1+\varepsilon)\leq\min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda(\varepsilon +1)}\mathbb{E}(e^{\lambda\|u\|^2}) P(∥u∥2−1≥ε)=P(∥u∥2≥1+ε)≤λ>0min​e−λ(ε+1)E(eλ∥u∥2)

\begin{aligned} \mathbb{E}(e^{\lambda\|u\|^2})&=\mathbb{E} (e^{\lambda \sum u_i ^2})\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n \mathbb{E}(e^{\lambda u_i^2})\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n \int_{-\infty}^{\infty}\frac{\sqrt{n}}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\exp (-\frac{nu_i^2}{2})\exp (\lambda u_i^2)\rmd u_i\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n \int_{-\infty}^{\infty}\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\exp\left(-\frac{n-2\lambda}{n}\frac{v_i^2}{2}\right)\rmd v_i\\ &=\left(\sqrt{\frac{n}{n-2\lambda}}\right)^n \end{aligned}

即

P(∥u∥−1≥ε)≤min⁡λ>0e−λ(ε+1)(nn−2λ)n2P(\|u\|-1\geq \varepsilon)\leq \min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda(\varepsilon+1)}\left(\frac{n}{n-2\lambda}\right)^\frac{n}{2} P(∥u∥−1≥ε)≤λ>0min​e−λ(ε+1)(n−2λn​)2n​

取f(λ)=e−λ(ε+1)(nn−2λ)n2f(\lambda)=e^{-\lambda(\varepsilon+1)}\left(\frac{n}{n-2\lambda}\right)^\frac{n}{2}f(λ)=e−λ(ε+1)(n−2λn​)2n​

\frac{\rmd f(\lambda)}{\rmd \lambda}=e^{-\lambda(\varepsilon+1)}\left[-(\varepsilon +1)\left(\frac{n}{n-2\lambda}\right)^{\frac{n}{2}}+\frac{n}{2}\left(\frac{n}{n-2\lambda}\right)^{\frac{n}{2}-1}\frac{2n}{(n-2\lambda)^2}\right]=0

根λ0=nε2(ε+1)\lambda_0 = \dfrac{n\varepsilon}{2(\varepsilon +1)}λ0​=2(ε+1)nε​

故

P(∥u∥−1≥ε)≤f(λ0)=e−nε2(1+ε)n2=en2(ln⁡(1+ε)−ε)P(\|u\|-1\geq \varepsilon)\leq f(\lambda_0)=e^{-\frac{n\varepsilon }{2}}(1+\varepsilon)^{\frac{n}{2}}=e^{\frac{n}{2}(\ln (1+\varepsilon)-\varepsilon )} P(∥u∥−1≥ε)≤f(λ0​)=e−2nε​(1+ε)2n​=e2n​(ln(1+ε)−ε)

当∥u∥2<1\|u\|^2<1∥u∥2<1时

P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤min⁡λ>0e−λεE(eλ(1−∥u∥2))=min⁡λ>0e−λ(ε−1)E(e−λ∥u∥2)P(1-\|u\|^2\leq \varepsilon)\leq \min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda\varepsilon}\mathbb{E}(e^{\lambda (1-\|u\|^2)})=\min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda (\varepsilon-1)}E(e^{-\lambda \|u\|^2}) P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤λ>0min​e−λεE(eλ(1−∥u∥2))=λ>0min​e−λ(ε−1)E(e−λ∥u∥2)

\begin{aligned} \mathbb{E}(-\lambda \|u\|^2)&= \mathbb{E}(e^{-\lambda \sum u_i^2})\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n \mathbb{E}(e^{-\lambda u_i^2})\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n \int_{-\infty}^{\infty}\frac{\sqrt{n}}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\exp(-\frac{nu_i^2}{2})\exp(-\lambda u_i^2)\rmd u_i\\ &=\prod_{i=1}^n\int_{-\infty}^{\infty}\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\exp (-\frac{n+2\lambda}{n}\frac{v_i^2}{2})\rmd v_i\\ &=\left(\frac{n}{n+2\lambda}\right)^\frac{n}{2} \end{aligned}

即

P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤min⁡λ>0e−λ(ε−1)(nn+2λ)n2P(1-\|u\|^2\leq \varepsilon)\leq \min_{\lambda>0}e^{-\lambda (\varepsilon-1)}\left(\frac{n}{n+2\lambda}\right)^{\frac{n}{2}} P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤λ>0min​e−λ(ε−1)(n+2λn​)2n​

取λ0=εn2(1−ε)\lambda_0 = \dfrac{\varepsilon n}{2(1-\varepsilon)}λ0​=2(1−ε)εn​

P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤eεn2(1−ε)n2=en2(ε+ln⁡(1−ε))P(1-\|u\|^2\leq \varepsilon)\leq e^{\frac{\varepsilon n}{2}}(1-\varepsilon)^\frac{n}{2}=e^{\frac{n}{2}(\varepsilon+\ln (1-\varepsilon))} P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤e2εn​(1−ε)2n​=e2n​(ε+ln(1−ε))

即

{P(∥u∥2−1≥ε)≤en2(ln⁡(1+ε)−ε)P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤en2(ε+ln⁡(1−ε))\begin{cases} P(\|u\|^2-1\geq \varepsilon)\leq e^{\frac{n}{2}(\ln (1+\varepsilon)-\varepsilon )}\\ P(1-\|u\|^2\leq \varepsilon)\leq e^{\frac{n}{2}(\varepsilon+\ln (1-\varepsilon))} \end{cases} {P(∥u∥2−1≥ε)≤e2n​(ln(1+ε)−ε)P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤e2n​(ε+ln(1−ε))​

考虑

ln⁡1+ε1−ε>2ε\ln \frac{1+\varepsilon}{1-\varepsilon}>2\varepsilon ln1−ε1+ε​>2ε

ln⁡(1+ε)−ε<−ε2C\ln (1+\varepsilon)-\varepsilon < -\frac{\varepsilon^2}{C} ln(1+ε)−ε<−Cε2​

C>max⁡ε∈(0,1)(ε2ε−ln⁡(1+ε))=11−ln⁡2≃3.26C>\max_{\varepsilon\in(0,1)}\left(\frac{\varepsilon^2}{\varepsilon-\ln(1+\varepsilon)}\right)=\frac{1}{1-\ln2}\simeq 3.26 C>ε∈(0,1)max​(ε−ln(1+ε)ε2​)=1−ln21​≃3.26

通常取C=4C=4C=4，则

{P(∥u∥2−1≥ε)≤e−nε28P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤e−nε28\begin{cases} P(\|u\|^2-1\geq \varepsilon)\leq e^{-\frac{n\varepsilon^2}{8}}\\ P(1-\|u\|^2\leq \varepsilon)\leq e^{-\frac{n\varepsilon^2}{8}} \end{cases} {P(∥u∥2−1≥ε)≤e−8nε2​P(1−∥u∥2≤ε)≤e−8nε2​​

P(∣∥u∥2−1∣≥ε)≤2e−nε28P(|\|u\|^2-1|\geq \varepsilon )\leq 2e^{-\frac{n\varepsilon^2}{8}} P(∣∥u∥2−1∣≥ε)≤2e−8nε2​

正交性引理

\forall u,v\in \calG, \forall \varepsilon \in(0,1), P(|\left|\geq \varepsilon)\leq 4\exp(-\frac{\varepsilon^2n}{8})

Proof:\mathbf{Proof:}Proof:
u,v∈Gu,v\in\mathcal{G}u,v∈G, 则 u+v2,u−v2∈G\dfrac{u+v}{\sqrt{2}},\dfrac{u-v}{\sqrt{2}}\in \mathcal{G}2​u+v​,2​u−v​∈G

一方面

P(∣<u,v>∣≥ε)≤P(∥u+v2∥2−1≥ε)+P(1−∥u−v2∥2≥ε)≤4exp⁡(−ε2n8)\begin{aligned} P(|\left<u,v\right>|\geq \varepsilon)&\leq P\left(\left\|\frac{u+v}{\sqrt{2}}\right\|^2-1\geq\varepsilon\right)+P\left(1-\left\|\frac{u-v}{\sqrt{2}}\right\|^2\geq \varepsilon\right)\\ &\leq 4\exp(-\frac{\varepsilon^2 n}{8}) \end{aligned} P(∣⟨u,v⟩∣≥ε)​≤P(​2​u+v​​2−1≥ε)+P(1−​2​u−v​​2≥ε)≤4exp(−8ε2n​)​

另一方面

P(−<u,v>≥ε)≤P(1−∥u+v2∥2≥ε)+P(∥u−v2∥2−1≥ε)≤4exp⁡(−ε2n8)\begin{aligned} P(-\left<u,v\right>\geq \varepsilon)&\leq P\left(1-\left\|\frac{u+v}{\sqrt{2}}\right\|^2\geq \varepsilon\right)+P\left(\left\|\frac{u-v}{\sqrt{2}}\right\|^2-1\geq \varepsilon\right)\\ &\leq 4\exp(-\frac{\varepsilon^2n}{8}) \end{aligned} P(−⟨u,v⟩≥ε)​≤P(1−​2​u+v​​2≥ε)+P(​2​u−v​​2−1≥ε)≤4exp(−8ε2n​)​

综上

P(∣<u,v>∣≥ε)≤4exp⁡(−ε2n8)P(|\left<u,v\right>|\geq \varepsilon)\leq 4\exp(-\frac{\varepsilon^2n}{8}) P(∣⟨u,v⟩∣≥ε)≤4exp(−8ε2n​)

Chernoff Bound

items.title: 微分流形
items.content_html:
微分流形

Definition 1.1 微分流形

一个Hausdorff空间MMM对于每一点的邻域都与欧式空间 Rn\mathbb{R}^nRn 的开集存在同胚，则称流形MMM是nnn维拓扑流形

Definition 1.2 坐标卡与转移映射

覆盖流形 MMM 的开集族 UUU, 欧式空间的开集族 VVV 与开集间的同胚 φ\varphiφ 的三元组构成流形 MMM 的坐标卡 (φ,U,V)(\varphi,U,V)(φ,U,V)

对于两个坐标卡 (φ,U1,V1),(ψ,U2,V2)(\varphi,U_1,V_1),(\psi,U_2,V_2)(φ,U1​,V1​),(ψ,U2​,V2​), 转移映射定义为在流形的两个坐标图之间的映射

{φ∣U1∩U2∘(ψ∣U1∩U2)−1:ψ(U1∩U2)→φ(U1∩U2)ψ∣U1∩U2∘(φ∣U1∩U2)−1:φ(U1∩U2)→ψ(U1∩U2)\begin{dcases} \varphi\Big|_{U_1\cap U_2}\circ (\psi\Big|_{U_1\cap U_2})^{-1}: \psi(U_1\cap U_2)\to \varphi(U_1\cap U_2)\\ \psi\Big|_{U_1\cap U_2}\circ (\varphi\Big|_{U_1\cap U_2})^{-1}: \varphi(U_1\cap U_2)\to \psi(U_1\cap U_2)\\ \end{dcases} ⎩⎨⎧​φ​U1​∩U2​​∘(ψ​U1​∩U2​​)−1:ψ(U1​∩U2​)→φ(U1​∩U2​)ψ​U1​∩U2​​∘(φ​U1​∩U2​​)−1:φ(U1​∩U2​)→ψ(U1​∩U2​)​

如果转移映射是微分同胚，则称这两个坐标卡是相容的

Definition 1.3 积流形

对于mmm维流形MMM与nnn维流形NNN，积空间M×NM\times NM×N赋予积拓扑是m+nm+nm+n维流形。对于流形MMM的坐标卡(φ,U1,V1)(\varphi,U_1,V_1)(φ,U1​,V1​)与流形NNN的坐标卡(ψ,U2,V2)(\psi,U_2,V_2)(ψ,U2​,V2​), 三元集(φ×ψ,U1×U2,V1×V2)(\varphi\times \psi, U_1\times U_2, V_1\times V_2)(φ×ψ,U1​×U2​,V1​×V2​)是M×NM\times NM×N的坐标卡

一个nnn维拓扑流形MMM，总满足

  • MMM是Hausdorff空间
  • MMM是第二可数的
  • MMM是局部欧式空间

Corollary1.1

若拓扑流形 MMM 可以被单独一个坐标卡覆盖，那么这个坐标卡自动地给出了 MMM 上
的一个光滑结构.

显然，对于坐标卡 (φ,U,V)(\varphi,U,V)(φ,U,V),转移映射 φ∘φ−1(x)=x\varphi\circ\varphi^{-1}(x) = xφ∘φ−1(x)=x 是光滑的

Example 1.1 映射图像的光滑结构

对于欧式开集 U⊂RmU\subset \mathbb{R}^mU⊂Rm 与 f:U→Rnf:U\to \mathbb{R}^nf:U→Rn，定义fff的图像为

Γ(f)={(x,y)∣x∈U,y=f(x)}⊂Rm+n\Gamma(f) = \{(x,y)\big|x\in U, y=f(x)\}\subset \mathbb{R}^{m+n} Γ(f)={(x,y)​x∈U,y=f(x)}⊂Rm+n

有自然投射 φ:Γ(f)→U,φ(x,y)=x\varphi:\Gamma(f)\to U, \varphi(x,y) = xφ:Γ(f)→U,φ(x,y)=x 为局部同胚。赋予坐标卡 (φ,Γ(f),U)(\varphi,\Gamma(f),U)(φ,Γ(f),U)，这个坐标卡单独覆盖了整个流形， 则 Γ(f)\Gamma(f)Γ(f) 为一个 mmm 维光滑流形

Example 1.2 球面的光滑结构

自协方差函数

  • 协方差

Cov(X,Y)=E([X−μX][Y−μY])=E(XY−XμY−YμX+μXμY)=E(XY)−μYE(X)−μXE(X)+E(X)E(Y)=E(XY)−E(X)E(Y)\begin{aligned} \mathrm{Cov}(X,Y)&=\mathbb{E}(\left[ X-\mu_X\right]\left[ Y-\mu _Y\right])\\ &= \mathbb{E}(XY-X\mu_Y-Y\mu_X+\mu_X\mu_Y)\\ &= \mathbb{E}(XY)-\mu_Y\mathbb{E}(X)-\mu_X\mathbb{E}(X)+\mathbb{E}(X)\mathbb{E}(Y)\\ &= \mathbb{E}(XY)-\mathbb{E}(X)\mathbb{E}(Y) \end{aligned} Cov(X,Y)​=E([X−μX​][Y−μY​])=E(XY−XμY​−YμX​+μX​μY​)=E(XY)−μY​E(X)−μX​E(X)+E(X)E(Y)=E(XY)−E(X)E(Y)​

  • 平稳随机序列
    对于时间序列{Xn}\{X_n\}{Xn​}，满足
    • (1) ∀t∈N,D(Xt)<∞(1)\,\forall t\in \mathbb{N}, \mathrm{D}(X_t)< \infty(1)∀t∈N,D(Xt​)<∞
    • (2) ∀t∈N,E(Xt)=μ(2)\, \forall t\in \mathbb{N},\mathbb{E}(X_t)=\mu(2)∀t∈N,E(Xt​)=μ
    • (3) ∀t,s∈N,γt−s:=E([Xt−μ][Xs−μ])=Cov(Xt,Xs)(3)\, \forall t,s \in \mathbb{N},\gamma_{t-s}:=\mathbb{E}(\left[X_t-\mu\right]\left[X_s-\mu\right])=\mathrm{Cov}(X_t,X_s)(3)∀t,s∈N,γt−s​:=E([Xt​−μ][Xs​−μ])=Cov(Xt​,Xs​)，称为时间序列的自协反差函数。自协方差函数满足平移不变性：Cov(Xt+x,Xs+x)=Cov(Xt,Xs)\mathrm{Cov}(X_{t+x},X_{s+x})=\mathrm{Cov}(X_t,X_s)Cov(Xt+x​,Xs+x​)=Cov(Xt​,Xs​)
      自协方差函数满足如下三条性质
  • (1)(1)(1) 对称性 γk=γ−k\gamma_k=\gamma_{-k}γk​=γ−k​
  • (2)(2)(2) 非负定性

Γn=(γ0γ1⋯γn−1γ1γ0⋯γn−2⋮⋱γn−1γn−2⋯γ0)\Gamma_n = \begin{pmatrix} \gamma_0&\gamma_1&\cdots&\gamma_{n-1}\\ \gamma_1&\gamma_0&\cdots&\gamma_{n-2}\\ \vdots&&\ddots&\\ \gamma_{n-1}&\gamma_{n-2}&\cdots & \gamma_0 \end{pmatrix} Γn​=​γ0​γ1​⋮γn−1​​γ1​γ0​γn−2​​⋯⋯⋱⋯​γn−1​γn−2​γ0​​​

Proof:\mathrm{Proof:}Proof:

αTΓnα=∑i,jaiajγi−j=∑i,jaiajE([Xi−μ][Xj−μ])=E(∑i,jaiaj(Xi−μ)(Xj−μ))=E(∑iai(Xi−μ)∑jaj(Xj−μ))=E([∑iai(Xi−μ)]2)=D(∑iai(Xi−μ))≥0\begin{aligned} \alpha^T\Gamma_n\alpha&=\sum_{i,j}a_ia_j\gamma_{i-j}\\ &=\sum_{i,j}a_ia_j\mathbb{E}(\left[X_i-\mu\right]\left[X_j-\mu\right])\\ &=\mathbb{E}\left(\sum_{i,j}a_ia_j\left(X_i-\mu\right)(X_j-\mu)\right)\\ &=\mathbb{E}\left(\sum_{i}a_i\left(X_i-\mu\right)\sum_ja_j(X_j-\mu)\right)\\ &=\mathbb{E}\left(\left[\sum_ia_i(X_i-\mu)\right]^2\right)\\ &=\mathrm{D}\left(\sum_{i}a_i(X_i-\mu)\right)\geq 0 \end{aligned} αTΓn​α​=i,j∑​ai​aj​γi−j​=i,j∑​ai​aj​E([Xi​−μ][Xj​−μ])=E(i,j∑​ai​aj​(Xi​−μ)(Xj​−μ))=E(i∑​ai​(Xi​−μ)j∑​aj​(Xj​−μ))=E​[i∑​ai​(Xi​−μ)]2​=D(i∑​ai​(Xi​−μ))≥0​

  • (3)(3)(3) 有界性 ∣γk∣≤∣γ0∣<∞|\gamma_k|\leq |\gamma_0|<\infty∣γk​∣≤∣γ0​∣<∞
    Proof:\mathrm{Proof:}Proof:
    取k=u−vk=u-vk=u−v，则

    ∣γk∣=∣E[(Xu−μ)(Xv−μ)]∣≤E[(Xu−μ)]2 E[(Xv−μ)2]=D(Xu−μ)=γ0 \begin{aligned} |\gamma_k|&=\left|\mathbb{E}\left[\left(X_u-\mu\right)(X_v-\mu)\right]\right|\\ &\leq \sqrt{\mathbb{E}[(X_u-\mu)]^2\,\mathbb{E}[(X_v-\mu)^2]}\\ &=\mathrm{D}(X_u-\mu)=\gamma_0 \end{aligned} ∣γk​∣​=∣E[(Xu​−μ)(Xv​−μ)]∣≤E[(Xu​−μ)]2E[(Xv​−μ)2]​=D(Xu​−μ)=γ0​​

白噪声

  • 定义
    白噪声是一列平稳序列{εt}\{\varepsilon_t\}{εt​}，满足:

我们可以逐点构造一个非平稳的正态时间序列，且不是正态白噪声
取定TTT,假设

Xt(T)=12π∫Re−(t+T)22dTXs(T)=12π∫Re−(s+T)22dT\begin{align*} X_t(T)&=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\int_{\mathbb{R}}e^{-\tfrac{(t+T)^2}{2}}\mathrm{d}T\\ X_s(T)&=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\int_{\mathbb{R}}e^{-\tfrac{(s+T)^2}{2}}\mathrm{d}T\\ \end{align*} Xt​(T)Xs​(T)​=2π​1​∫R​e−2(t+T)2​dT=2π​1​∫R​e−2(s+T)2​dT​

Cov(Xt,Xs)=E(Xt,Xs)=∫RT2πe−(t+T)22−(s+T)22dT=12π∫RT2πe−2T2+2(s+t)T+s2+t22dT=12πe−s2+t22∫RT2πe−T2−(s+t)TdT=12πe−s2+t22+(s+t)24∫RT2πe−(T+s+t2)2dT=1πe−(s−t)24 E(N(−s+t2,12))=−s+t2πe−(s−t)24≠0\begin{align*} \mathrm{Cov}(X_t,X_s)&=\mathbb{E}(X_t,X_s)\\ &=\int_{\mathbb{R}}\frac{T}{2\pi}e^{-\tfrac{(t+T)^2}{2}-\tfrac{(s+T)^2}{2}}\mathrm{d}T\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}\int_{\mathbb{R}}\frac{T}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-\tfrac{2T^2+2(s+t)T+s^2+t^2}{2}}\mathrm{d}T\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-\tfrac{s^2+t^2}{2}}\int_{\mathbb{R}}\frac{T}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-T^2-(s+t)T}\mathrm{d}T\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-\tfrac{s^2+t^2}{2}+\tfrac{(s+t)^2}{4}}\int_{\mathbb{R}}\frac{T}{\sqrt{2\pi}}e^{-(T+\tfrac{s+t}{2})^2}\mathrm{d}T\\ &=\frac{1}{\sqrt{\pi}}e^{-\tfrac{(s-t)^2}{4}}\,\mathbb{E}({\small N(-\frac{s+t}{2},\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}})})\\ &=-\frac{s+t}{2\pi}e^{-\tfrac{(s-t)^2}{4}}\neq0 \end{align*} Cov(Xt​,Xs​)​=E(Xt​,Xs​)=∫R​2πT​e−2(t+T)2​−2(s+T)2​dT=2π​1​∫R​2π​T​e−22T2+2(s+t)T+s2+t2​dT=2π​1​e−2s2+t2​∫R​2π​T​e−T2−(s+t)TdT=2π​1​e−2s2+t2​+4(s+t)2​∫R​2π​T​e−(T+2s+t​)2dT=π​1​e−4(s−t)2​E(N(−2s+t​,2​1​))=−2πs+t​e−4(s−t)2​=0​

我们人为的对正态随机变量设定了一个约束 -- 让不同时刻的随机变量取值的位置相对固定，这样子的时间序列就不是一个独立的时间序列，也就不是一个平稳序列。
